raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atkat notikke ta KUNga
Wahrds us man/ un faztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ fazz
veennu Rauo-Dsečinu prett to
Kehniku no Tirns/ un taki no
wienna: Ta fakka tas Kungs
KUNGS: Tu Mehrku-Gizzejs/
pils Gudribas un tohtiskaitts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu biji eeksch Eedenes
Deewa Dahrsâ/ wiſſadi dahrgi
Akmiati bija taws Apfegs/ Sar-
dis/ Topaz/ Demanti/ Turkötti/
Oniki/Jaspisi/ Gawiri/ Ameti-
sti/ Smaragdi un Selts. Tawu
Bungu un tawu Stabulu
Darbs bija pee tewis/ tai Dee-
nâ/ kad tu (par Kehniku) ee-
zelts tapvi/ bija tee gattawt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Kerub/ kas tu ſwat-
dihts eſſi un apflahj/ es biju te-
wi ta eezehtis: Tu biji us Dee-
wa Swehtu Kalnu/ tu staigaji deg-
gotchu Akmiatu Widdii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu biji pilmigs eekſch ta-
weem Zelteem/ tai Deená/ kad
tu (par Kehniku) eezelts tappi/
kameyr Netaisniba eekſch tervim
tappe atrasta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zaur tawu daschadu Prez-
zeſchanu irr tee tawu Widdu ar
Warras-Darbn peepthdijschi/ un
tu eſſi apgrehkojees/ tapehz ts-
imettischu es tewi ta ſagahnitu no
ta Deewa Kalna/ un famaita-
ſchuto Kernbu/ kas apflahj/ no to
degguschu Akmiatu Widdus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tawa Sirds leppo tawa
Skaistuma deht/ tu eſſi tawu
Gudribu zaur tawu Spohſchu-
ma maiajs/ tapehz mettitſchu es
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ar tawu leelu Noseegu-
mu zaur to Netaisnibu tawas
Prezzeschanas eſſi tu tawas
fwehtas Leetas tagahnijis. Ta-
pehz liſchu es Ugguni no tawa
Widdus iſeet/ tas tewi aprihs/
un es darrischu tew par Belneem
wirs Semmes / preekſch wiſſu
Azzim/ kas tew eerauga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſi / kas tewi pasihst
starp teem Laudim/istrubzina-
fees vahr tewi/ tu eſſi par nenee-
ka tappis/ un buhſi par neneeku
muhſchigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atkat notikke ta KUNga
Wahrds us man/ kas faztija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ greeſ-
tawu Watgu prett Ztydonu/ un e-
ſluddina prett winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fakki: Ta fakka tas
Klings KUNGS: Redsi/ es
gribbu prett tewi Af Zibdon! un
es tapſchu pagohdinahts tawâ
Widdii/ un juhs fajuttifeet/ ka
eſ tas KUNGS eſmu/ kad es
Teefu pahr winnu neſſitchu/ un
mannu Swehtibu winnam pa-
rabditſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es fuhtischu eekſch wiſſ-
na Mehri / un Aſſini wiſſas
winna Geläs/ un tee Nokautee
frittifs winna Widdu zaur Sob-
biniu / kas prett winnu buhſ
wiſſapkahrt / un tee fainutibs/
ka es tas KUNGS eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Iſraëta Namnam
ne buhſ wairß nekahdi duerrami
Ehrſſch.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
